# Smart Academy Portal Workspace Instructions

- Build the project as a premium dark-first SaaS LMS.
- Prioritize the 30% MVP: auth, roles, course and lecture flow, checkpoint locking, AI quiz generation, human validation, attempts, progress, and guardian views.
- Avoid implementing ML, clustering, advanced recommendations, anomaly detection, or full analytics in this phase.
- Keep the UI polished, futuristic, and enterprise-grade.
- Use local Ollama for the current AI quiz-generation validation phase; do not train a local model.
